svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1004px; height: 1px; padding-top: 24px; margin-left: 269px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 172px; overflow: hidden; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

ol.li: User sends a message via WhatsApp or Instagram DM.
Meta Cloud API forwards the webhook to Amazon API Gateway.
Receiver Lambda: detects channel, validates, reads credentials from Secrets Manager, downloads media to S3, saves to DynamoDB.
DynamoDB Stream with tumbling window (20s) buffers messages from the same user.
Processor Lambda: resolves canonical user from unified users table, aggregates messages, transcribes audio, invokes AgentCore once per user.
AgentCore Runtime processes with memory context and dispatches response via the correct channel API.
